title: Oportun Financial Corporation Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Oportun reported Q4 2023 revenue of $263 million, closing the full year 2023 with record revenue of $1.1 billion, representing 11% growth. The company reported EPS of -$0.53, missing expectations. The adjusted net loss reached $21 million, or $0.54 per share, compared to a $5 million profit in the prior year quarter. Adjusted EBITDA improved significantly to $6 million, marking a $40 million year-over-year increase. The annualized net charge-off rate improved to 12.3%, down 50 basis points year-over-year. The front book of loans originated since July 2022 showed loss rates approximately 400 basis points lower than legacy loans. Early-stage delinquencies (1-29 days) fell below 2023 levels. Borrowing members using the Oportun mobile app exhibited approximately 45% lower 30-plus day delinquencies three months after loan disbursement. Operating expenses declined 15% year-over-year to $129 million. The company announced an additional $30 million in annualized cost reductions for 2024. 2024 Guidance: Total revenue $975 million to $1 billion. Annualized net charge-off rate: 11.9% ±50 basis points. Adjusted EBITDA: $60 million to $70 million. Management completed a successful $200 million asset-backed securitization at 8.4% weighted average interest rate.
